name: LINE Pay
description: LINE Pay — Japan and Taiwan digital wallet by LINE Corp supporting QR, NFC, and online payments integrated into LINE messaging app.

seo.title: LINE Pay — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: LINE Pay: LINE Pay — Japan and Taiwan digital wallet by LINE Corp supporting QR, NFC, and online payments integrated into LINE messaging app.

when_to_use: LINE Pay digital wallet checkout for Japanese and Taiwanese e-commerce
QR and NFC payment acceptance for merchants in Japan and Taiwan
In-app LINE Pay integration for apps targeting LINE messenger users
Cross-border payments leveraging LINE Pay's Japan/Taiwan user base

pros: Huge user base in Japan and Taiwan
QR, NFC, and online payments unified
Strong brand trust for local consumers
cons: Japan and Taiwan only — limited reach
Settlement and refund flows can be slow
review.verdict: Must-have wallet for Japan and Taiwan merchants — conversion lift is substantial for LINE-active audiences.
review.best_for: Merchants selling to Japan or Taiwan consumers using LINE
review.not_for: Merchants without Japan or Taiwan user base
